context.note: No database migrations required - filtering uses existing started_at columns

objective.goal: Add date range picker component to the dashboard
Update all API routes to accept date parameters
Filter executions, metrics, and trends by selected date range

success_criteria.criterion: Date picker opens and closes correctly
Date range persists in URL parameters
Metrics update based on date range
Trend chart updates based on date range

api_specification.note: All endpoints now accept date range parameters

testing_checklist.test: Date picker opens and closes correctly
Date range persists in URL parameters
Metrics update based on date range
Trend chart updates based on date range

implementation_prompt.next_phase: Phase 03: Flaky Test Detection - Automatically detect and track intermittently passing tests
